# Feature: <Name>

## Purpose

Describe what this feature does for the user.

## Code Roots

- `lib/features/<feature>/domain/`
- `lib/features/<feature>/data/`
- `lib/features/<feature>/presentation/`

## State

Provider(s), key state fields, and loading/error behavior.

## Storage

Hive boxes, SharedPreferences keys, secure storage keys, files, or APIs.

## Important Flows

```text
Widget -> Provider -> UseCase -> Repository -> DataSource
```

-
